metric: network: send -> SSE stream close (full response generated)
widget: inline shadow-DOM widget, renders interactive product cards (Add to Cart) in chat
session_note: Warm session (server-side persisted context); long context tends to slow generation, so figures are conservative.

results.q: What is your trial period and return policy?
Do you offer financing or payment plans?
How long does delivery take once I order?
Are your mattresses good for side sleepers?
I'm a hot sleeper with back pain — which mattress do you recommend?
Can you recommend a pillow to go with it?

answers.free_shipping: Casper offers free shipping on most products within the contiguous United States, except for adjustable bases ($50) and bed frames/headboards ($25). For Alaska and Hawaii, shipping is $20 for small items and $250 for large products. Return shipping is always free. In-home delivery and setup is available for $249.
answers.trial_return: Casper mattresses come with a 100-night trial period. If you're not 100% in love after the first 30 nights, returns are free and easy. Furniture: 30-night trial (extended to 100 if purchased with a mattress). Soft goods (pillows, bedding): no trial, but return unused items within 30 days.
answers.financing: Yes, Casper offers financing and payment plans through Affirm, Katapult, and others at checkout.
answers.delivery: Most in-stock Casper products are delivered within 2–8 business days after the order ships.
answers.side_sleepers: Yes! Casper mattresses are designed to support all sleep positions, including side sleepers.
answers.hot_sleeper_rec: For hot sleepers with back pain, I recommend checking out Casper's Snow mattresses (Snow / Snow Max) — they use cooling technology and offer strong support. [Rendered interactive product cards with Add to Cart]
answers.pillow_rec: Absolutely! For hot sleepers, the Hybrid Snow Pillow or Foam Pillow with cooling would pair well. [Product recommendation]
